doctor.name: Dr. Rohan Malhotra
doctor.biography: Dr. Rohan Malhotra is a double-credentialed dermatologist specializing in advanced clinical dermatology, aesthetic lasers, and hair transplantation. With a patient-centric philosophy, he integrates state-of-the-art technologies with evidence-based medical therapies to deliver optimal health and cosmetic results.
fellowships: Fellowship in Advanced Laser & Aesthetic Surgery (Singapore)
Certified Injector of Dermal Fillers & Botox
Specialized Training in FUE Hair Restoration Surgery
experience: 10+ Years of Active Clinical Practice in Dermatology
Conducted over 7,000+ successful clinical and laser procedures
Speaker at various National Aesthetic Conferences
associations: Lifetime Member of Indian Association of Dermatologists, Venereologists and Leprologists (IADVL)
Member of Cosmetic Dermatology Society of India (CDSI)

slides.description: Dr. Amit Sharma provides personalized dermatology, hair health, and general medicine solutions in Surat.
Revitalize your skin with premium cosmetic therapies designed to restore youthful glow and eliminate dark spots.
Safe, FDA-approved laser technology targeting acne scars, pigmentation, and permanent hair reduction.
Get diagnosed by certified medical experts for root-cause solutions to chronic dermatological issues.

whyChooseUs.title: Qualified Doctor
whyChooseUs.description: Led by Dr. Amit Sharma, a double-credentialed dermatologist with years of clinical expertise.

whyChooseUs.title: Advanced Tech
whyChooseUs.description: Utilizing FDA-approved laser technology and sterile, modern medical equipment for all procedures.

whyChooseUs.title: Excellent Results
whyChooseUs.description: Over 7,000 successful treatments delivering high satisfaction rates for skin, hair, and cosmetic needs.

about.title: Trusted Healthcare in Bengaluru
about.description: Offering expert care in dermatology, hair health, general medicine, and homeopathy. We focus on patient-centric, personalized treatment plans tailored to your unique needs under the direction of Dr. Rohan Malhotra.
about.address: Suite 405, 4th Floor, Skyline Tower, MG Road, Ashok Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560001

aestheticCare.title: Hair Treatments
aestheticCare.description: Advanced therapies including FUE hair transplants, PRP scalp rejuvenation, and hair fall control protocols designed to restore thickness and vitality.

aestheticCare.title: Skin Treatment
aestheticCare.description: Targeted therapies for acne scars, pigmentation, microdermabrasion, and clinical facials to restore a radiant and healthy complexion.

aestheticCare.title: Plastic Surgery Treatments
aestheticCare.description: Premium cosmetic surgical consultations and procedures for facial contouring, rhinoplasty, and structural skin modifications.

aestheticCare.title: Laser Treatment
aestheticCare.description: FDA-approved laser therapies for permanent hair reduction, skin resurfacing, and precise vascular or pigmentation treatments.

aestheticCare.title: Dermatology treatment
aestheticCare.description: Comprehensive clinical diagnosis and medical care for complex skin conditions, eczema, psoriasis, rashes, and fungal infections.

aestheticCare.title: Anti Ageing Treatment
aestheticCare.description: Restorative non-surgical treatments including clinical wrinkle reductions, dermal fillers, and thread lifts to regain youthful elasticity.

items.name: Rahul Sharma
items.text: Excellent care for my skin issues. Dr. Amit is very professional and explained the treatment clearly.

items.name: Anjali Patel
items.text: The best clinic in Surat for hair treatments. I saw results within a few weeks. Highly recommended!

items.name: Vikram Singh
items.text: Very clean clinic and friendly staff. Dr. Amit's diagnosis was spot on for my chronic skin condition.
